name: DeepEval
what_it_does: LLM evaluation framework with 14+ built-in metrics (hallucination, answer relevancy, bias, toxicity, etc.) that integrates with pytest for CI/CD pipelines and optionally syncs results to the Confident AI cloud dashboard.
use_cases: Integrate LLM quality gates into a CI/CD pipeline using pytest to block deployments when hallucination score degrades
Run A/B evaluation of two prompt versions across a golden dataset to choose the better prompt
Evaluate RAG pipelines for faithfulness and contextual recall before promoting to production
Detect bias and toxicity regressions in fine-tuned models as part of a model release process
Track LLM evaluation scores over time in the Confident AI dashboard to identify quality drift
not_for: Real-time production inference monitoring — DeepEval is for offline batch evaluation, not live traffic scoring
Evaluating non-text modalities like images or audio
Teams that need evaluation metrics without any LLM judge calls — most metrics require an LLM evaluator
best_when: You want pytest-native LLM testing with a rich metric library and optional cloud result tracking, and you already have a CI/CD pipeline to plug into.
avoid_when: You need a pure offline open-source evaluation library with no cloud dependency and minimal LLM judge call costs.

auth.notes: DEEPEVAL_API_KEY environment variable for Confident AI cloud sync; not required for local-only evaluation runs.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Local evaluation is free and unlimited; Confident AI cloud dashboard has a free tier with limited test run history
pricing.paid_tiers: Pro and Team tiers for extended cloud history, team collaboration, and higher API limits
pricing.notes: Core library is Apache-2.0 open source. Confident AI cloud is optional and freemium. LLM judge API calls billed by provider.

performance.rate_limits: Cloud sync API rate limits apply; local evaluation has no limits beyond LLM provider throttling

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: Metric failures include reason strings explaining why a test case failed, making debugging straightforward; pytest output is clean and actionable.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Evaluation runs are deterministic at temperature=0; results are reproducible given identical test cases and LLM judge.
known_agent_gotchas: Metric threshold defaults are opinionated (0.5) and may not match your quality bar — always tune thresholds for your use case
Running all 14+ metrics simultaneously multiplies LLM judge call costs — select only the metrics relevant to your evaluation
Confident AI cloud sync sends test data to their servers — review data privacy implications before using with sensitive prompts
Async evaluation requires explicit event loop management; mixing sync and async metrics in one run can cause deadlocks
Custom metrics require subclassing BaseMetric and implementing measure() — no declarative DSL for custom scoring logic

security_score_components.security_notes: Local evaluation keeps all data on-machine; cloud sync transmits test case data to Confident AI — evaluate data classification before enabling.
